title: microstylis odorata
intro: Microstylis odorata, also known as the Indian orchid or the yellow pond lily, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Microstylis odorata include treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
